hero.title: RideNow: Your Journey, Simplified
hero.subtitle: Get a reliable ride in minutes. Fast, safe, and always available when you need it.

features.fastDesc: Never wait long for a ride with our optimized matching algorithm.
features.safeDesc: Verified drivers and real-time trip tracking for your peace of mind.
features.availableDesc: 24/7 service across the city, wherever you are.
